title: Rules reference
excerpt: Learn about the structure of rules and the order in which Radar processes them. To understand how Radar transaction rules work with Stripe *Connect* (Connect is Stripe's solution for multi-party businesses, such as marketplace or software platforms, to route payments between sellers, customers, and other recipients), see [Using Radar with Connect](https://docs.stripe.com/connect/radar.md). Before creating a rule, you need to understand how they’re processed and what transaction and account attributes you can use to set evaluation criteria. The Stripe machine-learning fraud systems can block many fraudulent payments for you, but you can also set up rules that are unique to your business using the [supported attributes](https://docs.stripe.com/radar/rules/reference.md#supported-attributes).…
